title: EasySit
description: A lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets players sit anywhere using the /sit command and stand up by sneaking. Perfect for roleplay and cozy builds.
body:
EasySit 🪑
Sit anywhere in Minecraft with a simple command!

EasySit is a lightweight Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.4 that allows players to sit anywhere using the /sit command. Whether you're roleplaying, decorating cozy areas, or just relaxing after a long mining session — this plugin adds a fun and immersive feature to your server!

💡 Features
Sit anywhere with /sit

Stand up by sneaking (Shift)

Smooth and simple sitting animation

No dependencies

Works out of the box – plug & play

Perfect for roleplay, survival, or social servers

🎮 How to Use
Type /sit to sit down

Press Shift (sneak) to stand up
